    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class Worksheet

    Encapsulates a single worksheet and its supported v0.1 worksheet features.

    Inheritance
    object
    Worksheet
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.MemberwiseClone()
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.ToString()
    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public class Worksheet
    Examples
    var workbook = new Workbook();
var sheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];

sheet.Name = "Data";
sheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("North");
sheet.Cells["B1"].PutValue(42);
sheet.Zoom = 120;
sheet.PageSetup.Orientation = PageOrientationType.Landscape;

    Gets auto-filter settings for the worksheet.

    Gets the cell grid facade for the worksheet.

    Gets the collection of comments (legacy notes) on this worksheet.

    Declaration

    Protection

    Gets worksheet protection settings.

    Declaration
    public WorksheetProtection Protection { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description

    RightToLeft

    Gets or sets whether the worksheet view is right-to-left.

    Declaration
    public bool RightToLeft { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description

    Shapes

    Gets the collection of drawing objects (shapes) on this worksheet.

    Declaration
    public ShapeCollection Shapes { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description

    ShowGridlines

    Gets or sets whether gridlines are shown in the worksheet view.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowGridlines { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowRowColumnHeaders

    Gets or sets whether row and column headers are shown in the worksheet view.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowRowColumnHeaders { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowZeros

    Gets or sets whether zero values are shown in the worksheet view.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowZeros { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    TabColor

    Gets or sets the worksheet tab color.

    Declaration
    public Color TabColor { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    Color

    Validations

    Gets the worksheet data validation collection.

    Declaration
    public ValidationCollection Validations { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    ValidationCollection

    VisibilityType

    Gets or sets the worksheet visibility state.

    Declaration
    public VisibilityType VisibilityType { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    VisibilityType

    Zoom

    Gets or sets the worksheet zoom percentage.

    Declaration
    public int Zoom { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    int
    Remarks

    Valid zoom values range from 10 to 400, representing 10% to 400% zoom level. A value of 100 represents normal zoom (100%), lower values zoom out, higher values zoom in. The zoom setting affects the visual display of the worksheet but does not change the actual cell data.

    Examples
    var workbook = new Workbook();
var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];

// Set zoom to 150% for better visibility
worksheet.Zoom = 150;

// Set zoom to 50% for overview
worksheet.Zoom = 50;

    Methods

    Protect()

    Marks the worksheet as protected using the current protection settings.

    Declaration
    public void Protect()

    Unprotect()

    Clears worksheet protection and resets supported protection flags.

    Declaration
    public void Unprotect()
